creator: Vladimir.Chukharev@tut.fi
text:
graphics/inkscape does not build. This is for a few weeks already.
All other ports are fresh, last cvsup was yesterday.

 $ portversion -vofFL= 
inkscape-0.48.1_4           <  needs updating (port has 0.48.2_1) 
 $ sudo nice portmaster  -H  -D -G --no-confirm inkscape 
Password:

===>>> Currently installed version: inkscape-0.48.1_4
===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/graphics/inkscape
